calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-30-2003 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Susan Lee. There being no appearance by either party, the Court ordered the matter off calendar and the trial date is vacated.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-25-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Afreen Wahab appearing in propria persona 731-3461, demurring party
Defendant did not notify plaintiff about appearing for argument. The Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT AFREEN WAHAB's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (JJM/301/CL) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR #4780
